# CLA signatures

This branch stores CLA signatures collected by the [CLA Assistant](https://github.com/contributor-assistant/github-action) workflow.

It is intentionally kept outside `main` so that `main`'s branch protection rules (which require a pull request before merging) do not block the bot from appending signatures.

**Do not edit this branch manually.** The bot writes `.github/cla-signatures.json` here automatically when contributors sign.
